title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma with CNF-dual and explicit layer-schedule infrastructure
description:
A curated Lean 4 artifact for a SimpleDNF switching lemma in a canonical decision-tree encoding, together with a CNF-dual bridge, complemented decision trees, bounded-depth formula bridge infrastructure, explicit three-layer schedules, and list-indexed alternating DNF/CNF schedule certificates.

Non-claims: this artifact does not prove P != NP, P = NP, an NP or circuit lower bound, a Frege/PHP lower bound, arbitrary AC0 collapse, arbitrary bounded-depth formula collapse, or a general CNF switching lemma independent of the explicit dualization bridge.
